nasb.text: Now the Lord saw that Leah was unloved, and He opened her womb, but Rachel was barren.

esv.text: When the Lord saw that Leah was hated, he opened her womb, but Rachel was barren.

cnv.text: 耶和華見利亞失寵，就使她生育，拉結卻不生育。

ccb.text: 耶和华看见利亚失宠，就使利亚生育，但拉结却不生育。

csbs.text: 耶和华见莉亚被嫌弃，就使她能生育；瑞秋却不能生育。
